evals.prompt: Build me a workflow that takes a URL as input, opens it with the browser-use-web-navigator agent, and reports the page title plus a one-paragraph summary. Find the agent's id via /api/agents (or psql), insert the workflow into the DB, and tell me the canvas URL so I can run it.
evals.expected_output: Valid SW 1.0 spec with: trigger schema declaring `url` (string/uri/required); one durable/run task with real agentRef.id (not the placeholder); prompt uses jq full-string concat (no embedded interpolation); matching nodes/edges (3 nodes: __start__, agent task, __end__); workflow row inserted with non-NULL project_id via scripts/upsert-workflow.py; canvas URL printed.

evals.prompt: I have a workflow that runs a coding agent in a workspace, but the live preview returns 404 'Retained sandbox not found' immediately after the run finishes. Fix it.
evals.expected_output: Identifies that `with.keepAfterRun: true` is missing on the workspace/profile step (per references/troubleshooting.md § Workspace / sandbox). Edits the spec to add it. Mentions the persist_workspace_session activity contract and the _should_cleanup_workspaces gate that reads the spec — not just task outputs.

evals.prompt: My durable/run step times out — the agent never seems to start. Walk me through what to check.
evals.expected_output: Triage from references/troubleshooting.md: AgentRuntime CR phase (`kubectl get agentruntime/<slug>`), per-agent pod logs, daprd sidecar logs, controller-managed dapr-agent-py-statestore scope for the app id, and openshell-sandbox-dapr-webhook namespaceSelector. Distinguishes 'Ignoring unexpected taskCompleted event' (normal replay chatter) from actually stuck. Suggests rolling restart of agent-runtime-controller as the Kopf annotation watcher fix, but does not tell the user to manually add every new slug to scopes as the normal path.

evals.prompt: I added the Outlook MCP connection to my agent and sent a test message, but the agent never responded. Debug it without exposing any OAuth tokens.
evals.expected_output: Uses references/mcp-connections.md and troubleshooting.md. Checks activepieces-mcp-catalog, ap-microsoft-outlook-service KService readiness and no-port /mcp URL, mcp_connection.connection_external_id -> active app_connection.external_id, AgentRuntime/Deployment DAPR_AGENT_PY_BOOTSTRAP_MCP_SERVERS_JSON, and dapr-agent-py [mcp-bootstrap] logs. Explains credentials flow through X-Connection-External-Id/internal decrypt API and avoids printing or embedding OAuth secrets.
